purpose: Reusable imagegen components for cinematic cyberpunk decks: rainy bedroom city view, rooftop city viewpoint, and transparent HUD overlays.
copyRule: When using this kit in a generated deck, copy templates/themes/assets/neon-noir-city into the deck's ./assets/neon-noir-city directory, then reference WebP files with PNG fallback.

assets.use: Cover hero or narrative opening background: neon bedroom interior with city window, title-safe dark left area.
Section divider or strategic outlook background: rooftop silhouette overlooking rainy neon city.
Transparent HUD overlay for data, architecture, product, AI, and operating-system slides.

layoutGuidance: Use cinematic full-bleed backgrounds for covers and section dividers; place readable text in dark translucent title blocks.
Use HUD overlays on content slides as secondary texture, never behind dense paragraphs.
Prefer magenta/cyan/violet accents, wet-reflection panels, thin luminous borders, and dark glass cards.
Keep neon effects controlled; avoid rainbow palettes, overexposed glow, and cluttered text.
For interior/product/process slides, use dark glass panels over a subtle grid/rain background rather than full scenic images on every page.
referenceImages: rainy neon cyberpunk bedroom with huge city window
dense megacity signage, holographic billboards, wet reflections
